steps.title: Identify the cost structure
steps.content: The club charges \$16 for the first book and \$12 for each book after the first. If $x$ is the total number of books, then the number of additional books is $(x - 1)$.

steps.title: Build the total cost equation
steps.content:
Total cost equals the fixed charge for the first book plus the variable cost for all additional books:

$$y = 16 + 12(x - 1)$$

Rearranging to match the answer choices:

$$y = 12(x - 1) + 16$$

This matches choice C — C is correct.
